objects.name: Analytic 1784
objects.description: Defender observes an app enumerating installed security/management controls (AV/EDR/MDM/VPN/Play Protect) via PackageManager, DevicePolicyManager, AppOps, and Settings queries or shell ‘pm list’ usage, optionally probing Accessibility/Device Admin state. Enumeration is followed by local inventory artifact creation and/or small egress. Chain: capability to query → burst of security-focused checks (packages/permissions/policies) → optional foreground targeting → artifact write → quick POST.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: getInstalledPackages/getPackagesHoldingPermissions with filters for known security/MDM/VPN package names. Queries to isDeviceOwnerApp/isProfileOwnerApp/getActiveAdmins/getPermissionGrantState. Requests list of enabled services or monitors TYPE_WINDOW_STATE_CHANGED to time checks

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Command 'pm list packages' executed by app sandbox or child proc

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Reads/queries ops for PACKAGE_USAGE_STATS, QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES, BIND_DEVICE_ADMIN, BIND_VPN_SERVICE

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Secure/Global reads of device_policy_manager, accessibility_enabled, default_vpn, always_on_vpn

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max time from discovery burst to persist/exfil (e.g., 10–120s).
Minimum API calls/rows indicating inventory (e.g., ≥30 in 10s).
Regex/prefix list of AV/EDR/MDM/VPN packages & services to elevate severity.
Regex for local inventory artifacts (DB/JSON/TXT) in app container.
Scope to Work Profile events to reduce personal-profile noise.
